title: Adam Wants to Be a Man
actors: Vitalijus Puodziukaitis, Audrone Bajerciute, Stasis Petronaitis
plot: In a pre-WWII Lithuanian town, occupied with unemployed workers and crooks of various kinds, lives Adam, a naive young man with no job and a lot of dreams. His closest friend is the Captain, an old sea wolf with many tales to tell...
